candidates.command: git commit -m feat(storage): define BlobStore interface and migrate attachment/evidence writes [ddx-8e54a916] - Add cli/internal/blob/ with Store interface, LocalFSBlob (atomic Put via temp+fsync+rename using os.CreateTemp for concurrent-safe unique temps), MemoryBlob, and shared conformance test suite covering all operations. - Wire bead.Store.Blobs (blob.Store) into NewStore; readEventsAttachment and writeEventsAttachment route through BlobStore; on-disk paths unchanged. - Add ExecuteBeadRuntime.Blobs (injectable, defaults to LocalFSBlob); all per-attempt evidence writes (prompt.md, manifest.json, result.json, usage.json) in execute_bead.go route through wtBlobStore / rootBlobStore. - Multi-blob write discipline: non-manifest blobs written first, manifest written last; enforced by TestPrepareArtifacts_ManifestNotWrittenOnPromptPutFailure. - executions_mirror.go unchanged; AppendMirrorIndex doc comment cites FEAT-028 StreamStore deferral. Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
